guidance.wrapperRole: Fermented Connecticut Broadleaf brings molasses, dark cocoa, and raisin sweetness.
guidance.binderRole: Dominican binder supports even burn through the sweet wrapper.
guidance.fillerRole: Dominican filler adds cedar backbone without overwhelming the maduro finish.
guidance.bestFor: Heavy tannic red wine, dark porter, rich espresso, contrast wildcard flights.
guidance.avoidIf: User wants dry, ultra-mild Connecticut only.
guidance.whyRecommend: Recommend as Ashton contrast pick against bitter espresso or tannic pours — maduro sweetness, not VSG spice bomb.
guidance.memberBlurb: Ashton Aged Maduro — broadleaf sweetness for after-dinner contrast; pairs with espresso and Cabernet-style reds.

guidance.bestFor: Luxury or refined requests, mid-tier single malt, high-proof rye, clean mezcal.
guidance.whyRecommend: Recommend as Ashton refined line — more elegant than VSG, more body than Classic.
guidance.memberBlurb: Ashton Symmetry — refined Ecuador Habano balance for celebration pours without full VSG intensity.
